waterRiskCheck.description: Get information and recommendations for your address
waterRiskCheck.title: Flood prevention guide
waterRiskCheck.slogan: Protect yourself early – use the flood prevention guide!
waterRiskCheck.generelExplenationText: The flood prevention guide provides you with information on whether your property could be affected by flooding and what measures you can take.
waterRiskCheck.instructionsText: To create your personalized guide, please answer the four questions in the questionnaire below. To do so, enter your address in the search field below. Your answers will then be automatically analyzed, and you will immediately receive information and recommendations tailored to your property regarding flood prevention. You will also learn how to respond correctly in an emergency.
waterRiskCheck.address: All you need is their address
waterRiskCheck.information: Your information will not be saved
waterRiskCheck.informationText:
The questionnaire is only available to authorised persons. You are authorised if you live at the specified address or are the owner of the property in question.

By clicking on „Start questionnaire“, you confirm that you are authorised to use the questionnaire for the address specified above.
waterRiskCheck.downloadInformationText: Click on the blue button to download your personal results as a PDF. A PDF reader is required to view this file.
waterRiskCheck.downloadInformationTextRestart: If you would like to restart the questionnaire, please click on the button below.
waterRiskCheck.addressInput: Please start by entering the address in the search field on the left!
waterRiskCheck.reset: The questionnaire will be reset including all answers. You can restart the questionnaire with a different address.
waterRiskCheck.logoText: The flood prevention guide is supported by the Klimaplan-Förderung programme.
